raw_consumer_statement: I got a call from Wayfair stating a charge of {$1900.00}. Was used to purchase carpets and sent overseas. I did not make this purchase so they reverse the charge. While investing they found it was actually sent to a " charity '' and because of that, they could not get the money back so I am responsible for the charge. I am XXXX  and on SSI. They set me on a {$35.00} / month for 58 months at 0 % apr. This is still a hardship. It was a very well played scam but they will not reverse the charges.
